channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Strait of Hormuz is more open than previously thought as the U.S. shoots down Iranian drones threatening ships and provides 'naval overwatch'
item.description: "The attack drones posed an immediate threat to regional maritime traffic," U.S. Central Command said.

item.title: This realtor is betting big on the AI IPO boom, but buying a house with stock will have to go through the OpenAI's and Anthropic's boards first
item.description: In a tight housing market, some Bay Area homesellers believe exchanging their houses for stock will benefit asset-rich tech workers. But those transac...

item.title: Retiring at 62 costs the average American $250,000. Here's the math (and the neuroscience) that explain why
item.description: Longevity risk is the retirement crisis no one is talking about enough. An NBER study on cognitive decline just made the financial case harder to igno...

item.title: How Howie Mandel turned a panic attack into a mental health movement and helped build a company now worth hundreds of millions
item.description: Howie Mandel partnered with NOCD, a telehealth app, to raise awareness about OCD. The campaign involved Billy Bob Thornton and other celebrities.
